project.name: Fluxbot Studio IA
project.description: Shopify AI Chatbot App — Conversational Commerce Platform

phase0.title: Foundation regression contract (auth / navigation / env / build / Shopify connection)
phase0.description: Core Phase 0 test suite that must remain green on every production change
acceptance_criteria: 68/68 Phase 0 tests passing
JWT HS256 signature validated
shop/host/embedded query params preserved across navigation
Shopify Admin GraphQL connection verified
Required environment variables validated
TypeScript build and project structure validated
phase0.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Foundation regression contract (auth / navigation / env / build / Shopify connection) para core Phase 0 test suite that must remain green on every production change.

phase0.title: Frontend configuration decoupled from provider secrets
phase0.description: Config layer reads IA_BACKEND_URL / IA_BACKEND_API_KEY; provider API keys live only in backend repo
acceptance_criteria: No provider API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) in frontend .env
IA_BACKEND_URL and IA_BACKEND_API_KEY are the only IA-related env vars
Local fallback available via IA_EXECUTION_MODE=local for development only
phase0.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Frontend configuration decoupled from provider secrets para config layer reads IA_BACKEND_URL / IA_BACKEND_API_KEY; provider API keys live only in backend repo.

phase1.title: Shopify embedded app shell + admin routes
phase1.description: Full embedded admin with Polaris UI, App Bridge, OAuth and all admin pages
acceptance_criteria: App loads embedded in Shopify admin
All admin pages render without errors
OAuth flow completes and session is persisted
Polaris layout applied consistently
phase1.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Shopify embedded app shell + admin routes para full embedded admin with Polaris UI, App Bridge, OAuth and all admin pages.

phase1.title: HTTP gateway and contract toward fluxbot-studio-back-ia
phase1.description: Typed client and server-side gateway that routes all IA calls to the backend repo over versioned /api/v1/* contracts
acceptance_criteria: All IA calls go through IAGateway abstraction
Contract tests validate request/response shapes
Remote-first by default, local fallback for development
Versioned endpoints (/api/v1/*) used consistently
phase1.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar HTTP gateway and contract toward fluxbot-studio-back-ia para typed client and server-side gateway that routes all IA calls to the backend repo over versioned /api/v1/* contracts.

phase1.title: Chat orchestration and retrieval migrated to backend IA
phase1.description: api.chat.ts delegates to backend via gateway; no LLM calls in frontend
acceptance_criteria: Chat route delegates to IAGateway, no direct LLM calls in frontend
Backend orchestrates provider selection, retrieval and generation
Guardrails applied in backend
phase1.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Chat orchestration and retrieval migrated to backend IA para api.chat.ts delegates to backend via gateway; no LLM calls in frontend.

phase1.title: Order lookup — read-only commerce capability
phase1.description: Customers can query order status; frontend owns the lookup, backend IA can invoke it as a tool
acceptance_criteria: Order status returned for verified order reference
No mutation of order data
Route secured; PII not leaked
phase1.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Order lookup — read-only commerce capability para customers can query order status; frontend owns the lookup, backend IA can invoke it as a tool.

phase1.title: PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM — multi-tenant schema
phase1.description: Full schema deployed; all frontend entities with tenant isolation
acceptance_criteria: All migrations deployed
shopId foreign key on all tenant-scoped models
Prisma client generated and typed
phase1.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM — multi-tenant schema para full schema deployed; all frontend entities with tenant isolation.

phase2.title: Behavioral event capture and conversion signal storage
phase2.description: Frontend captures browser events (dwell, scroll, exit intent, cart, product view) and stores them for analysis
acceptance_criteria: Single and batch event endpoints working
BehaviorEvent model persisted in DB
Events forwarded as inputs to backend IA for analysis
phase2.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Behavioral event capture and conversion signal storage para frontend captures browser events (dwell, scroll, exit intent, cart, product view) and stores them for analysis.

phase2.title: Intent detection and trigger decisioning — migrated to backend IA
phase2.description: Intent classification and trigger evaluation are remote-only; frontend only proxies via gateway
acceptance_criteria: Intent analysis route delegates to /api/v1/intent/* contract
Trigger evaluation delegates to /api/v1/triggers/*
No local fallback — backend IA is required
Contract tests pass
phase2.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Intent detection and trigger decisioning — migrated to backend IA para intent classification and trigger evaluation are remote-only; frontend only proxies via gateway.

phase2.title: Commerce execution layer (add-to-cart, handoff persistence)
phase2.description: Frontend owns cart mutation and handoff record; backend IA can invoke these as tools
acceptance_criteria: Cart add action validated and executed via Shopify Storefront API
HandoffRequest record persisted with full conversation context
Both routes secured and audited
phase2.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Commerce execution layer (add-to-cart, handoff persistence) para frontend owns cart mutation and handoff record; backend IA can invoke these as tools.

phase2.title: Proactive messaging — decisioning in backend, dispatch in frontend
phase2.description: Backend IA decides when and what to send; frontend dispatches and tracks cooldowns
acceptance_criteria: Proactive trigger evaluation proxied to backend
Dispatch and frequency capping handled in frontend
ProactiveMessage records persisted
phase2.user_story: Como equipo de producto y plataforma de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Proactive messaging — decisioning in backend, dispatch in frontend para backend IA decides when and what to send; frontend dispatches and tracks cooldowns.

phase2.title: Advanced reranking and RAG quality pipeline
phase2.description: RAG search delegated to backend via versioned contract with quality params (minScore, rerankStrategy, topK)
acceptance_criteria: RAG search uses /api/v1/rag/search with quality params
Reranking strategy configurable per request
Quality metadata returned and logged
phase2.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Advanced reranking and RAG quality pipeline para rAG search delegated to backend via versioned contract with quality params (minScore, rerankStrategy, topK).

phase3.title: Omnichannel delivery and callback operations
phase3.description: WhatsApp, Instagram, SMS, Email delivery surfaces with callback handling
acceptance_criteria: Delivery callback route handles external channel acknowledgements
DeadLetterCallback model captures failed deliveries
OmnichannelCallbackReceipt persisted per delivery
phase3.next_step: Add provider-specific onboarding (WhatsApp Business API, Instagram DM) and merchant controls in admin UI
phase3.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Omnichannel delivery and callback operations para whatsApp, Instagram, SMS, Email delivery surfaces with callback handling.

phase3.title: llms.txt generation and publication
phase3.description: Backend generates structured llms.txt content; frontend publishes it at the public endpoint
acceptance_criteria: GET /llms.txt returns valid structured content
Admin page shows generation status
Backend generation contract stable and versioned
phase3.user_story: Como equipo de producto y plataforma de Fluxbot, quiero implementar llms.txt generation and publication para backend generates structured llms.txt content; frontend publishes it at the public endpoint.

phase3.title: Marketing automations and multilingual campaigns
phase3.description: Campaign CRUD, dispatch and multilingual template resolution; backend IA emits campaign metadata in trigger payloads
acceptance_criteria: Campaign CRUD endpoints working
Dispatch endpoint triggers proactive message delivery
Localization service resolves templates by locale
Backend emits campaignId in trigger recommendation payloads
phase3.user_story: Como equipo de producto y plataforma de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Marketing automations and multilingual campaigns para campaign CRUD, dispatch and multilingual template resolution; backend IA emits campaign metadata in trigger payloads.

phase4.title: Enterprise compliance and governance
phase4.description: Data residency, regional deployment controls, retention enforcement, legal holds, breach notifications, RGPD audit trail
acceptance_criteria: DataResidencyService enforces country-level storage rules
RegionalDeploymentControlService configures per-region controls
LegalHoldService creates, lists and releases holds
ProcessingRecordService tracks RGPD activity register
BreachNotificationService tracks 72h reporting window
RetentionEnforcementService deletes data beyond retention thresholds
Scheduler job enforces retention policies periodically
phase4.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Enterprise compliance and governance para data residency, regional deployment controls, retention enforcement, legal holds, breach notifications, RGPD audit trail.

phase5.title: Enterprise connector hardening (SIEM, legal hold workflow, regional deployment)
phase5.description: Extended governance infrastructure for enterprise merchants
acceptance_criteria: Legal hold and deployment policy endpoints operational
Retention exclusions scoped per data class
phase5.next_step: Integrate external SIEM adapters (Datadog/Splunk) and persist legal holds in DB
phase5.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Enterprise connector hardening (SIEM, legal hold workflow, regional deployment) para extended governance infrastructure for enterprise merchants.

phase6.title: Architecture separation closure
phase6.description: All IA logic routed through IAGateway; legacy local IA services preserved only as controlled fallback
acceptance_criteria: Primary chat and retrieval flows use remote gateway
Local compatibility path only active with IA_EXECUTION_MODE=local
Contract-first gateway tests passing
SEPARATION_PLAN.md documents all migrated capabilities
phase6.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Architecture separation closure para all IA logic routed through IAGateway; legacy local IA services preserved only as controlled fallback.

phase7.title: Storefront widget publication admin surface
phase7.description: Admin UI for publishing and managing the storefront chat widget via Theme App Embed
acceptance_criteria: Widget publish/reset controls working in admin
Widget config served via App Proxy
Storefront widget routes (apps.fluxbot.*) accessible
phase7.next_step: Replace manual confirmation with automatic Theme App Embed verification via Shopify Admin API
phase7.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Storefront widget publication admin surface para admin UI for publishing and managing the storefront chat widget via Theme App Embed.

phase8.title: Remote vector retrieval contract (/api/v1/embeddings/search)
phase8.description: Frontend vector retrieval service uses backend IA as remote-first with local JSON fallback for development
acceptance_criteria: Vector retrieval proxied to /api/v1/embeddings/search
Contract test validates request/response shape
Local JSON fallback only when IA_EXECUTION_MODE=local
phase8.next_step: Migrate storage from JSON embeddings to pgvector or ANN index for production-scale retrieval
phase8.user_story: Como equipo de producto y plataforma de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Remote vector retrieval contract (/api/v1/embeddings/search) para frontend vector retrieval service uses backend IA as remote-first with local JSON fallback for development.

backend_ia.title: Express API server with authentication and rate limiting
backend_ia.description: Backend IA entrypoint with JWT auth middleware, helmet, cors, rate limiter and structured logging
acceptance_criteria: API starts and accepts requests
JWT auth middleware validates IA_BACKEND_API_KEY
Rate limiting active
Structured logs emitted via winston
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Express API server with authentication and rate limiting para backend IA entrypoint with JWT auth middleware, helmet, cors, rate limiter and structured logging.

backend_ia.title: LLM orchestration — provider-agnostic chat
backend_ia.description: Orchestration service selects provider (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini), composes context and generates responses
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/chat accepts message + conversationId + context
Provider selected based on AIProviderConfig for the shop
Guardrails applied before response is returned
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar LLM orchestration — provider-agnostic chat para orchestration service selects provider (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini), composes context and generates responses.

backend_ia.title: RAG — retrieval augmented generation pipeline
backend_ia.description: Hybrid search with embeddings + metadata filters + optional reranking
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/rag/search returns ranked chunks
Quality params (minScore, rerankStrategy, topK) supported
KnowledgeChunk and EmbeddingRecord models in DB
POST /api/v1/embeddings/search for vector retrieval
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar RAG — retrieval augmented generation pipeline para hybrid search with embeddings + metadata filters + optional reranking.

backend_ia.title: Intent detection and trigger decisioning
backend_ia.description: Intent classifier and proactive trigger evaluation fully owned by backend IA
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/intent/analyze returns intent classification
POST /api/v1/triggers/evaluate returns trigger recommendation
IntentSignal and ProactiveTrigger persisted in DB
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Intent detection and trigger decisioning para intent classifier and proactive trigger evaluation fully owned by backend IA.

backend_ia.title: Knowledge graph, commerce tools and analytics
backend_ia.description: Knowledge graph for product relationships, commerce tool service and IA analytics tracking
acceptance_criteria: Knowledge graph routes available
Commerce tool service returns structured product/policy data
IA analytics (tokens, cost, latency) tracked per conversation
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Knowledge graph, commerce tools and analytics para knowledge graph for product relationships, commerce tool service and IA analytics tracking.

backend_ia.title: Shop reference sync and AI provider config management
backend_ia.description: Backend maintains Shop reference table and per-shop AI provider configuration
acceptance_criteria: Shop reference created/updated on first sync from frontend
AIProviderConfig managed per shop with encrypted API keys
Provider selection respects per-shop config
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Shop reference sync and AI provider config management para backend maintains Shop reference table and per-shop AI provider configuration.

backend_ia.title: llms.txt content generation
backend_ia.description: Backend generates structured llms.txt content; frontend publishes it
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/llms-txt/:shopId returns structured content
Content includes product summaries, policies and FAQs
Frontend publication route calls this endpoint
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar llms.txt content generation para backend generates structured llms.txt content; frontend publishes it.

backend_ia.title: Enterprise compliance and omnichannel routes in backend
backend_ia.description: Backend-side compliance checks and omnichannel delivery support
acceptance_criteria: Compliance route exposes data residency and governance APIs
Omnichannel route supports multi-channel delivery decisions
backend_ia.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Enterprise compliance and omnichannel routes in backend para backend-side compliance checks and omnichannel delivery support.

open_items.title: Storefront widget — Theme App Extension (real embed)
open_items.description: Actual Liquid/JS storefront widget installable via Theme App Embed Block; currently only admin publish UI exists
acceptance_criteria: Theme App Extension created and published
App Embed Block lazy-loads chat widget
Lighthouse impact < 5 points
Widget works on Online Store 2.0 themes
open_items.evidence: Extension registered in shopify.app.toml. CSS changed to non-render-blocking (print media trick). 25 new tests in widget-extension-config.test.ts. symlink architecture preserved (storefront-widget is canonical). Total suite: 56/56 files, 1011 tests.
open_items.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Storefront widget — Theme App Extension (real embed) para actual Liquid/JS storefront widget installable via Theme App Embed Block; currently only admin publish UI exists.

open_items.title: Product & catalog synchronization (initial + incremental)
open_items.description: Webhook listeners and bulk sync jobs for products, variants, collections, pages, policies
acceptance_criteria: Initial sync jobs (catalog, policies, pages) queued automatically on new shop install
ensureShopRecord detects new vs existing shop before upsert
Sync job creation failure is non-fatal — shop record returned regardless
Incremental sync via webhooks: products/create, update, delete, collections, pages, orders/paid
All webhook topics registered in shopify.server.ts
Scheduler processes PENDING jobs every 30s
Admin UI (app.data-sources.tsx) allows manual sync trigger
SyncJob status tracked in DB (PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED)
ProductProjection, PolicyProjection, OrderProjection upserted on sync
KnowledgeDocument and KnowledgeChunk created for embedding
Monorepo service packages expose shared types and contracts
10 unit tests for ensureShopRecord passing
open_items.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Product & catalog synchronization (initial + incremental) para webhook listeners and bulk sync jobs for products, variants, collections, pages, policies.

open_items.title: Vector store upgrade to pgvector / ANN index
open_items.description: Replace current JSON-based embedding store with pgvector for production-scale retrieval
acceptance_criteria: pgvector extension enabled in PostgreSQL
EmbeddingRecord model uses vector column
ANN index (HNSW/IVFFlat) created
Retrieval latency < 100ms p99
evidence: fluxbot-studio-back-ia prisma/schema.prisma: postgresqlExtensions + vector(1536) field
fluxbot-studio-back-ia migration 20260409_pgvector_ann_index: HNSW index + backfill
fluxbot-studio-back-ia src/services/pgvector-search.ts: ANN + fallback + shopId isolation
fluxbot-studio-back-ia src/routes/embeddings.ts: /search uses pgvectorSearchService
fluxbot-studio-back-ia tests/unit/pgvector-search.test.ts: 17 tests, 49/49 suite
open_items.user_story: Como responsable del backend IA de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Vector store upgrade to pgvector / ANN index para replace current JSON-based embedding store with pgvector for production-scale retrieval.

open_items.title: External SIEM adapter integration (Datadog / Splunk)
open_items.description: Enterprise compliance SIEM export pipeline for audit events
acceptance_criteria: Audit events exported to configurable SIEM endpoint
Legal hold scoped retention exclusions per data class
evidence: app/services/enterprise-compliance.server.ts: ComplianceSIEMExportService with Datadog (HTTP Log Intake) and Splunk (HEC) connectors
app/services/enterprise-compliance.server.ts: LegalHoldService with scoped retention exclusions (ALL / CONVERSATIONS / BEHAVIOR_EVENTS / AUDIT_LOGS / CONSENT_RECORDS)
app/routes/api.compliance.enterprise.ts: export_siem_ndjson action with optional dispatchConnectors
test/integration/enterprise-compliance.test.ts: ComplianceSIEMExportService and RetentionEnforcementService scoped tests
test/integration/enterprise-compliance-route.test.ts: route-level export_siem_ndjson tests
1011/1011 tests passing
open_items.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar External SIEM adapter integration (Datadog / Splunk) para enterprise compliance SIEM export pipeline for audit events.

open_items.title: Phase 1 E2E chat test (needs running PostgreSQL)
open_items.description: test/phase1/chat-e2e.test.ts currently fails when DB is not available
acceptance_criteria: Test passes in CI with DB available
Or test mocked to not require a live DB
open_items.evidence: Implemented in-memory Prisma mock (test/mocks/prisma-in-memory.ts). All 15 E2E tests pass. Total suite: 55/55 files, 986/986 tests.
open_items.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Phase 1 E2E chat test (needs running PostgreSQL) para test/phase1/chat-e2e.test.ts currently fails when DB is not available.

open_items.title: Frontend admin alignment with local UI/UX skills
open_items.description: Apply the behavioral and visual characteristics defined in responsive-layout-guard, visual-consistency-review, admin-ui-ux, onboarding-flow, and implementation-rules across the Shopify admin frontend without breaking embedded navigation or form interactions.
acceptance_criteria: Admin screens use consistent spacing, hierarchy, cards, actions, and readable section structure aligned with admin-ui-ux and visual-consistency-review
Onboarding progress, labels, percentages, buttons, and step navigation do not overlap or break at 320px, 375px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px as required by responsive-layout-guard
Onboarding flow feels guided, lighter, and easier to scan, with working continue/back/complete actions and no navigation regressions
Technical AI controls remain available but are presented in merchant-friendly language instead of raw jargon when possible
Embedded Shopify query params and admin interactions remain stable across all updated routes per implementation-rules
Typecheck, targeted lint, and existing @fluxbot/shopify-admin-app tests remain green after the frontend refresh
evidence: apps/shopify-admin-app/app/components/admin-ui.tsx: shared AdminInfoCallout and card structure upgrades
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/components/admin-shell.tsx: safer spacing, form footer, and shared breathing-room refinements without changing working navigation architecture
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/routes/app.settings.tsx: merchant-friendly grouped sections for identity, response behavior, automation, and advanced guidance
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/routes/app.onboarding.tsx: responsive progress card, safer step grid, wrapped action footer, and more guided copy
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/routes/app._index.tsx: dashboard next-step guidance aligned with the updated admin language
Validated with typecheck, targeted eslint, and existing @fluxbot/shopify-admin-app test suite
open_items.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Frontend admin alignment with local UI/UX skills para apply the behavioral and visual characteristics defined in responsive-layout-guard, visual-consistency-review, admin-ui-ux, onboarding-flow, and implementation-rules across the Shopify admin frontend without breaking embedded navigation or form interactions.

open_items.title: Post-onboarding redirect and completion visibility
open_items.description: Once onboarding is completed, redirect merchants automatically to the home dashboard (/app, i.e. Panel) and run only the real background action for this step (shop reference registration). Onboarding copy must not claim catalog/policy sync unless that specific sync is triggered at this point; the dashboard must clearly show completed onboarding tasks.
acceptance_criteria: When onboarding is marked complete, the user is redirected automatically to /app (Panel) with no extra click
Shop reference registration starts asynchronously in the background and does not block the redirect
Onboarding step 4 copy explicitly describes shop reference registration and avoids claiming catalog/policy sync unless triggered there
The dashboard quick-start area explicitly communicates completed onboarding tasks (for example, X de Y tareas completadas)
The dashboard quick-start area includes the 'Entrenar IA' task card under 'Set up AI agent' as the place where synchronization/training status is shown
If synchronization/training was already completed, the same panel task is rendered as completed state instead of pending
Merchants can identify at a glance what has already been completed and what the next step is
evidence: apps/shopify-admin-app/app/routes/app.onboarding.tsx: step 4 copy now reflects real behavior (shop reference registration only), no catalog/policy sync claim
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/routes/app._index.tsx: dashboard now includes 'Set up AI agent' / 'Entrenar IA' card with sync/training status and completed-task counter
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/routes/app._index.tsx: task card shows completed state when prior sync jobs are completed and running state when jobs are active
apps/shopify-admin-app/app/services/shop-backend-sync.server.ts: onboarding completion path keeps async shop reference sync trigger
open_items.user_story: Como admin/merchant del panel de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Post-onboarding redirect and completion visibility para once onboarding is completed, redirect merchants automatically to the home dashboard (/app, i.e. Panel) and run only the real background action for this step (shop reference registration). Onboarding copy must not claim catalog/policy sync unless that specific sync is triggered at this point; the dashboard must clearly show completed onboarding tasks.

open_items.title: Fix intermittent blank screen on 'Handling response' auth bounce
open_items.description: After install + OAuth grant (first install or reinstall), the embedded app must never remain stuck on the intermediate Shopify auth screen that shows only 'Handling response'. The auth bounce must resolve automatically to a usable Fluxbot app route without requiring manual browser refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Session-token bounce redirects remove stale id_token and previous shopify-reload before building a new bounce URL
Generated shopify-reload points to the real app route and never contains nested shopify-reload recursion
Auth catch-all route exposes Shopify boundary ErrorBoundary/headers so intermediate auth responses are handled by App Bridge flow instead of rendering a raw 200-like screen
Document requests with expired sessions recover to a usable app route instead of staying in a permanent handling screen
Coverage includes: fresh install from zero, uninstall + reinstall, and session recovery bounce scenarios
evidence: authenticate-admin.server.ts now deletes shopify-reload before constructing /auth/session-token redirect
auth.$.tsx now includes ErrorBoundary to handle Shopify auth responses correctly
authenticate-admin.server.test.ts adds regression tests for clean bounce URL across install/reinstall paths
webhooks-lifecycle.test.ts covers uninstall state reset required for reinstall onboarding
install-auth-flow.spec.ts covers smoke-level install entry routes and onboarding route availability after lifecycle transitions
open_items.user_story: Como merchant de Shopify usando Fluxbot, quiero que tras instalar o reinstalar la app me lleve automaticamente al panel u onboarding sin quedarme en 'Handling response', para no tener que recargar manualmente y poder empezar a usar la app de inmediato.

use_cases.title: Instalacion inicial desde 0
flow: El merchant instala la app por primera vez
Shopify redirige al embed de Fluxbot
La app termina en /app o /app/onboarding sin pantalla intermedia bloqueada
use_cases.expected_result: No aparece pantalla permanente con 'Handling response' y no se requiere refresh manual

use_cases.title: Reinstalacion despues de desinstalar
flow: Fluxbot resetea estado de onboarding y marca tienda cancelada
El merchant reinstala y autoriza nuevamente
La app redirige al onboarding requerido sin quedar bloqueada
use_cases.expected_result: Onboarding reaparece correctamente y la UI sigue navegable

use_cases.title: Recuperacion de sesion expirada
flow: Shopify/App Bridge devuelve al recurso original
use_cases.expected_result: Recuperacion transparente sin loops ni pantalla de bloqueo

documentation.title: Synchronize agent guidance documentation
documentation.description: Keep all agent instructions and documentation links aligned across AGENTS, Claude, Copilot, Cursor, and OpenSpec.
acceptance_criteria: All published guide links are reflected in repo instructions
Documentation changes create OpenSpec tasks via git hooks
OpenSpec reports include a documentation phase
documentation.user_story: Como equipo de Fluxbot, quiero implementar Synchronize agent guidance documentation para keep all agent instructions and documentation links aligned across AGENTS, Claude, Copilot, Cursor, and OpenSpec.
